events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll write the required JSON directly to `/app/answer.json`. This condition is a code/listing compliance issue because ABS-to-PVC solvent-weld transitions require approved transition cement/listed method, not ordinary wrong cement.

events.label: shell
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "pwd && ls -la && cat > /app/answer.json <<'EOF'
{
  \"decision\": \"fail\",
  \"risk\": \"medium\",
  \"work_stage\": \"rough-complete\",
  \"component_conditions\": [\"installed-defective\", \"non-compliant\"],
  \"percent_complete\": 70,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.91,
  \"event_time\": 0,
  \"rate\": 0,
  \"order\": [],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"ABS-to-PVC transition was solvent-welded with cement not listed or approved for that material transition.\",
    \"Joint is installed defective and cannot be accepted at rough-complete inspection without correction and verification.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Remove and replace the improper ABS-to-PVC joint using an approved listed transition fitting, listed mechanical coupling, or transition cement specifically listed for ABS-to-PVC use as permitted by the local code and manufacturer instructions.\",
    \"Expose the corrected joint for inspection and perform required DWV testing before cover-up.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"The IPC requires piping materials, joints, and connections to be installed in accordance with the code and the manufacturer's listing/instructions. ABS-to-PVC solvent-weld transitions are not acceptable with ordinary ABS or PVC cement; the transition must use an approved/listed method or listed transition cement. The observed wrong cement makes the joint non-compliant at rough-complete stage.\",
  \"references\": [
    \"IPC: approved materials and installation per manufacturer's instructions/listing\",
    \"IPC: plastic pipe joints and solvent cement requirements for ABS and PVC DWV systems\",
    \"Manufacturer listings: solvent cement must be listed for the specific ABS-to-PVC transition use\"
  ]
}
EOF
python3 -m json.tool /app/answer.json >/dev/null"
→ /app
